response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and modern frontend frameworks like React. His background in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms, and enterprise tooling aligns well with the role's requirements. His open-source contributions and leadership in technical workshops further highlight his expertise and collaborative mindset.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (6+ years) with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes).
Proven track record in AI-agent development and developer tooling, directly relevant to the role.
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership, including workshops and talks on advanced topics.
concerns: Recent career gap (caregiving) may require discussion about current availability and commitment.
Experience with Nest.js (primary stack) is not explicitly mentioned, though Nest.js is Node.js-based and his Node.js expertise is strong.
Limited explicit mention of testing frameworks like Vitest, though he has experience with TDD and other testing methodologies.
